prompt: A clean neumorphic UI component showcase on a soft light gray background, arranged as a balanced design board of 18 separate interface elements with subtle shadows, frosted translucent white plastic surfaces, rounded corners, and glossy glass-like depth. Use a premium minimal product-design aesthetic with white-on-white layering, soft ambient occlusion, delicate inner shadows, and a restrained accent palette of deep teal green and vivid orange. Include 18 distinct components: 1 large circular rotary knob in the upper left with a dark teal glossy center, fine radial tick marks, and a small orange position indicator; 1 small circular directional control pad with a teal center button and four tiny arrow icons around it; 1 circular play button with a teal triangle icon and a short orange progress arc on the rim; 1 horizontal pill toggle switch at the top right with a teal knob positioned to the right; 1 rounded square heart button with a simple teal outline heart; 1 small circular indicator button with a single orange dot in the center; 1 pill-shaped plus-minus control with a teal minus on the left and teal plus on the right separated by a vertical divider; 1 long horizontal volume slider with a teal speaker icon on the left, fine slider ticks, a teal track, a teal knob near the right side, and a faint waveform icon on the far right; 1 circular percentage dial showing 60% with radial ticks and a few orange highlight marks near the upper right; 1 rounded square bell notification button with a teal outline bell icon; 1 compact music player card with a small square album image of misty evergreen trees on the left, the title Forest Drive, the subtitle Ambient Journey, a thin progress bar, and a circular play button on the right; 4 small circular utility icon buttons in one row showing sliders/settings, search, share, and ellipsis; 1 large circular compass with cardinal letters N, E, S, W plus diagonal labels, a teal-and-orange needle, and metallic center; 1 tall vertical slider on the right with a teal track, teal knob around the middle, small side dots, an orange accent near the bottom, and a tiny speaker icon below; 1 bottom navigation bar in a long rounded pill containing 4 icons separated by subtle dividers: home, bar chart, compass, and user profile, with the home tab active in teal; 1 large rounded pill call-to-action button in glossy dark teal labeled Explore with a circular orange arrow button attached on the right; and 1 rounded square fingerprint button with a teal fingerprint icon. Keep spacing generous, alignment grid-based, and the overall render highly polished, tactile, and futuristic, like a luxury smart-device UI kit mockup.
